text.title: Plan-Execute vs ReAct Worked Examples
text.summary: Three worked specs: Plan-Execute (deploy pipeline), ReAct (web research), Hybrid (multi-source synthesis).

example.note: Plan-Execute — 5-step deploy pipeline, all steps known, audit required.
ReAct — web research, surprising tool outputs reshape trajectory.
Hybrid — 15-step multi-source synthesis, top-level plan + per-step ReAct.
Bad — ReAct with max_turns=0 (r4 violation), no replan policy.
